Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

5.0/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Legacy Pool Service to get the job done right.

“When Hurricane Nicole hit our Coral Gables home, Legacy had our pool secured and drained to the perfect level. After the storm, they were first on-site to remove debris and had our system running before FPL restored power. Their prep saved our vintage 1970s pump from flood damage.”

Marcos R. Hurricane Prep & Recovery
Mar 15, 2025

“Restoring our 1926 Mediterranean Revival pool in West Palm Beach required someone who understood historic materials. Legacy sourced perfect matches for the original tiles and repaired the hand-painted coping without damaging the fragile plaster. The preservation board approved everything on first submission.”

Elena S. Historic Pool Restoration
Jan 22, 2025

“Our Brickell condo board hired Legacy to automate all 4 towers' pools. The new system alerts us to leaks immediately - they caught a cracked pipe under Deck 3 that was wasting 200 gallons daily. Remote control from New York during hurricane season is priceless.”

James L. Smart Pool Upgrades
Nov 30, 2024

“After 3 other companies failed to control the black algae in our Coconut Grove pool, Legacy identified it was feeding on phosphates from our well water. Their weekly brushing protocol and special treatments finally cleared it completely in 6 weeks.”

Isabella C. Algae Prevention & Treatment
Oct 18, 2024

“Living two blocks from the ocean in Miami Beach destroys pool equipment fast. Legacy's quarterly salt cell cleanings and corrosion checks have kept our system running 3 years longer than the manufacturer predicted. Their marine-grade replacement parts make all the difference.”

Carlos M. Saltwater Pool Maintenance
Sep 5, 2024

“Our Wynwood guesthouse pool deck was unbearably hot and slippery. Legacy resurfaced it with a cool-touch material that stays comfortable even at midday. The subtle terrazzo flecks match our art collection perfectly. No more burned feet!”

Sophia K. Pool Deck Resurfacing
Jul 21, 2024
Legacy Pool Service

Trusted pool service professionals serving Miami, FL and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.

555-poo-r94
